name: architect-cms
description: Manage Architect CMS from your terminal agent — models, entries, types, localization, context, lifecycle, webhooks, environments, SDK setup, MCP access, and content extraction via the architect CLI.

architect_url.title: Architect API URL
architect_url.description: Base URL of your Architect API.

architect_api_key.title: Management API key (optional)
architect_api_key.description: Optional — leave blank to reuse your `architect login` credentials. Set an arch_mgmt_… key only to override the logged-in account.

architect_org_id.title: Organization ID (optional)
architect_org_id.description: Optional — leave blank to reuse `architect login`. Override with an org_… id if needed.

architect_env_id.title: Environment ID (optional)
architect_env_id.description: Optional — leave blank to reuse `architect login`. Override with an env_… id. Switchable at runtime.
